# network(extendedPANID:)

**Type Method**

Obtains the Thread network extended PAN identifier.

## Declaration

```swift
static func network(extendedPANID: UInt64) -> MatterAddDeviceExtensionRequestHandler.ThreadNetworkAssociation
```

## Return Value

The Thread network extended PAN identifier.

## Discussion

The system retrieves the network parameters from [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ThreadNetwork/THClient/retrieveCredentials(forExtendedPANID:completion:)] using the provided parameter. The credentials must be present in the store or else association and pairing fails.

## Getting network information

- **defaultSystemNetwork**: A sentinel value to represent the system’s default Thread network.
